messages.message: I will not interfere with your movements in Tyrolia if you leave Venice unchallenged.
Hi Germany! Would you be interested in cooperating to split the lowlands between the two of us, and taking out England asap?
I intend to move into Tuscany this turn. If you attempt to block me, I will push back hard.

Hey Russia,
I'm excited for the possibility of working with you! If you are interested in working together we should talk about Dmzs and ways we can help one another grow quickly in this game. I'd like to get your thoughts on the matter :)

Hey France, I hope we can work together as the western powers in this game. I think it makes a lot of sense for us to be allies. If you'd be down for that let me know what I could do to make you happy.

Hey Russia, I know that we are close to each other and I hope that we can come to an agreement that benefits us both. I would like to take Norway this turn, but I would be happy to let you have Sweden. I think it's possible that you and Germany could make a good team and we could all work together there. But let me know what you think.

Hey England!
That's what I always like to hear from you at the beginning of a game. If I can get Sweden, I almost always send Moscow south as Russia. It's just that fleet in Stp always causes tension, so it's an insurance policy if nothing else.
I haven't heard from Germany yet so I'll let you know when he does.
As Russia that is...
Hi England! Are you interested in the standard cooperation in the lowlands? Belgium for me, Holland for you?
I will secure the western Mediterranean. Leave me the south coast of Italy and I will leave your eastern provinces alone.

Hi France,
I'm 100% down for this, England is always a massive threat for me in these games and FG works very well. I think our first year priority is to get you into the channel as quickly as possible so we can take them out early on. Do you want to try a standard sealion where you open to Picardy and then we take them out in 1902 or do you prefer a different strategy?
Have you talked much with the other powers in the west? We don't have a ton to coordinate on so far but we can definitely share intel if you're down
Ok. I'm sorry, but I think you have sent me a message to the wrong person :)
Nice to hear from you Italy! I look forward to cooperating with you in the coming years
Apologies for the error. I meant to say: I will secure the western Mediterranean. Leave me the south coast of Italy, and I will leave your eastern provinces alone.

Hey Germany!
I would like to propose we DMZ Pru/sil and keep peace on our border. I also like to set up the infamous Sealion with you and France to take down England. I think that would work in our favour.

I have contacted England about a peaceful split of the lowlands, but no other contact yet. I've also reached out to Italy, and they seem determined to move to Tuscany this year, so we might have to factor that into our plans

Hey Austria,
I'm excited for the possibility of working with you! If you are interested in working together we should talk about Dmzs and ways we can help one another grow quickly in this game. I'd like to get your thoughts on the matter :)

Hi Russia,
Definitely down to DMZ Pru/sil. I like the idea of the sealion, are you opening north or south? Are you planning to open north, what are you hearing from the other players?

That's a pretty unusual opening for Italy. If you're open to the attack on England you can open to the channel and burgundy to set up the opening move to Belgium. England is unlikely to bounce the channel in 1901 and that would give us a really early jump on them. What are your thoughts on that?

Hey France,
I was hoping to work with you and Germany in taking down England. I've already pitched the Sealion to Germany and he's down. Hopefully you two can come to an agreement.
Ha! I'm ok with that. I look forward to potentially working with you this game :)

Unacceptable. I need Tyrolia to defend against Russia and Germany, and I have no desire to pick a fight with you. If you decide to attack, it will only allow Turkey to become very strong and I will come for you with a vengeance, even if it means sacrificing my own Scs.
Yeah that sounds good.

Hey Italy,
I wanted to check in and wish you luck. I have yet to hear from Austria so I can't help with any Balkan plans, but hopefully we can be helpful to each other in the future.
We can talk about Dmzs and ways we can help one another grow quickly in this game. I'd like to get your thoughts on the matter :)
If you're going to open north I would be happy to allow you into Sweden in 1901. England and France are both pretty quiet but if they commit to the sealion you and I will have the jump on them
Tuscany is already mine this turn. Do not test me.
Ok cool. I haven't heard from Germany either.

I've pitched the Sealion to both of them, so if you haven't heard from them you're probably the lucky one.
Turkey reached out, so I think I might try for the southern opening.

Hi Austria,

Germany and Austria make great natural allies in this game so we should work together closely. I think one of the things that usually makes them solid allies is they have no reason to attack each other in the early game and if either of us falls apart early they're unlikely to be able to recover so a strong central alliance is always in our best interest. What are your thoughts on that?

Have you heard from the other players? I haven't heard too much yet so it's tough to make a read on what's going on. I'm still not sure where I stand in the west and I haven't heard much from Russia.

I got the same message. He offered to allow me into Sweden if I open north.
Nothing much more then that.
I am inclined to agree. Let's keep an eye on Italy, and keep each other informed.
Then we have an understanding. Leave Venice and Tyrolia to me and Germany, and I will leave you to your Balkan ambitions. No need for war.
I hope we can work together against Turkey. Would you be willing to make Galicia a DMZ?

Hi Italy,

As neighbors in the middle of the board we should work together to prevent any of us getting surrounded and attacked. To help with this I think we should keep Tyrolia as a DMZ. Have you heard much from the other players so far? I haven't heard much from France or Austria which is always a concern for Germany but if you have any other concerns let me know. I'm flexible on where I stand in the west but we should try to figure out where France is going. What are your thoughts on that?

We don't have much to coordinate on at this point but I think we can definitely share information that we hear.

Hey Germany,
Just checking in to see if you have any plans for Russia. I would be very interested in your thoughts on the matter :)
Hi Russia! Yes, Germany has also approached me about this, and I'm down for the plan. I'll try to get into the channel this turn, and we can see how things pan out
Thank you.
Dmzs can wait. Right now, I need your fleets out of my waters. If you respect our agreement, we’ll both gain ground.

I agree, Dmzs can wait. But where are you going with your fleets? If you want to help me gain ground, the Ionian needs to be a DMZ and any fleets you send there need to be on the North Coast of Italy (as in to Tyrrhenian Sea)

Hey Turkey,
I would definitely be down to work together. I think I will open with a southern opening so we can work on Austria. I would like to make Black Sea a DMZ.
Wow. So aggressive
Hey Germany, I wanted to know if you wanted to be allies. What are your thoughts on Holland and Belgium?
Great, if you hear anything from Russia or Italy about their intentions for the early game I would appreciate a heads up
Your Balkan ambitions will take time. I’ll be securing my flank in Italy. Let’s see if we need each other later.
He's also promised me Belgium so we'll see
I'm down for the attack, but Italy has threatened to move to Piedmont if I don't respect their wishes. Seems a bit more aggressive than I thought, haha
Sounds good.
I think we can work together. A/T alliances can be very effective. How are your negotiations going with Russia?
I take it he's also pushing you to open to the channel?
My fleet will hold Tyrrhenian Sea. The Ionian remains off-limits to both us for now. No fleets from either side there.

Hi Turkey,

I haven't decided much on what to do with Russia. England is the big threat in the west so I'm not moving east, if I see Russia going into England I would be more likely to attack them but it would depend on what they did in the south. Are you planning to move north or south?
I haven't heard too much from the other players yet so it's hard to make a good read on the game

The Black Sea can work. However, if we don't do a bounce, it will be pretty obvious that we are working together. So if we aren't bouncing, I think a bounce would be better. It will also keep us more honest with one another and work to hide our alliance. What do you think?
Sure thing, I can agree to that.
Tuscany is mine. Try to block me again, and I’ll push through. That’s final.

Hi England,

I would definitely be interested in working together. What are your thoughts on your opening? I'm guessing you'd be looking to open to the north and the channel?
Venice remains unchallenged. I will move into Tyrolia if you do not. We have an agreement.
That makes sense. I'll bounce with you.

Just heard from France, he's seems pretty concerned about you opening to Piedmont. I don't think that's a very good idea for Italy since if you move there you're unlikely to be able to take anything from them (and you leave yourself really open to an attack from Austria or Turkey).
I would appreciate it if you didn't move to Piedmont
Perfect. I look forward to working with you :)
Oh I'm sure you will
Tuscany is now under my control. If you wish to act, I suggest you focus elsewhere.
Italy wants to move against you, and I think he might be attacking me as well. Just a heads up.
Excellent.

What do you mean by a southern opening? Do you mean opening Mos - Sev or Mos - Stp? I don't want you to give Turkey too much ground in the south because if Austria and Italy gang up on them they won't be able to hold out.

I haven't heard from England and France is worried about Italy opening to Piedmont so I'm not sure if they'll move to the channel.
Russia and I have agreed to keep Galicia a DMZ. If he honors that, we'll probably be moving against Turkey together.
I don't think I'm gonna open to the channel.
The Tyrrhenian Sea is secure. I will hold it. Respect our pact, and we both grow.
I will not be moving into the Ionian. You will see from the beginning that I am going to work with you.
No, not at all.

Thanks for the info, I've heard the same from Italy. Turkey also asked me if I wanted to attack Russia so I think they might be working together. Have you worked things out with Russia over Galicia? Russia told me they agreed to a DMZ and the army in Moscow hasn't responded to my messages so I'm not sure what's going on with them.
I do not concern myself with France's worries. My army moves where it must. If Austria or Turkey choose to act, they will find me ready.
He is just asking what I'm doing with France
Makes sense, have you heard much from France or Russia?
Yeah, I'm not sure. I may not move to Galicia this turn, just in case.
Well, seeing as how you've already threatened me...
I'm just hoping to split the lowlands with Germany peacefully, and have my fleet in Portugal. Not moving to Piedmont to start a conflict

Can you clarify what you're planning to do with your armies? I'm getting the feeling that you aren't actually going to follow through with a Sealion so I'm going to have to put my army in Denmark instead.
How are things with Turkey and Italy? I'm worried that you could be in trouble if both of them decide to attack you.
Are you planning to open to the channel or burgundy?
Good, as far as I can tell. We will need to keep an eye on him though. Are you interested in trying to keep Russia out of Rum this year?

Yeah I would definitely prefer to see you attack France rather than Austria so I'm glad you're considering that as an option. How are things with Turkey and Russia? Turkey has asked me if I'm interested in moving on Russia. I'm guessing that could be used to trick you into moving out of position to attack Austria so they can attack you while you're committed against France.
Hello, France! I was wondering what your intentions toward Italy are?
Italy has told me that he and Germany are planning to attack you, but I have no idea how true that is.
I'm not sure if I'll be able to keep Russia out. I've got to watch out for Italy as well.
Tuscany is mine. If you wish to act, you’ll need more than concern. I’ll be watching your moves.
I'm heading south. I'm not sure yet how far north Russia is headed but I'll try and let you know. I'd definitely love to keep in touch with you and share information :)
That's a pretty aggressive move to ask you what you're doing with your ground units.
Turkey seems friendly enough. Italy... has been a little more elusive.
Are you bouncing in Gal?
Good. The Ionian remains untouched. Hold your end of the pact—I will too.
France promised me Holland but I'll take Belgium if you're ok with that. I haven't heard anything else from Russia, except that I think he wants to focus on the south.

Thanks for the intel! Italy seems pretty aggressive to me, they're very intent on taking Tuscany. I'm not sure how aggressive I'll be toward them, but I'll be keeping my options open. Let me know if I can help you out somehow
Yeah I've heard the same from Italy. Hopefully they attack France and not one of us haha
Seems like we have an understanding then
Russia has promised me Belgium too but I guess they can't promise both of us the same thing. Did France say if they were planning to open to the channel?
No, I'd prefer not to. I have to deal with Italy.

I'd prefer to move to the channel, but I don't want to provoke England to much in the first year, seeing as how we're working together against them. If you move to Ruhr, can I count on your support into Belgium in the fall?
Okay, thanks for the info. I still haven't heard a ton from the other players in the east so it's hard to make a good read on where everyone's headed
Yep!
I can keep him out of the Black Sea. Can you keep him out of Gal?

I mean that I would open Moscow to Ukraine to prepare to attack Austria or Turkey.
I think France said that he would open to the channel, but I can't be certain that he'll follow through.

What would you rather me do with my armies? Leave them stationary?
Ok, thank you.
Okay, no bounce then.
Tuscany is under my control. If you wish to act, focus on your own expansion. I will not tolerate interference.
Yeah that would be the plan
Will do. Same to you.
Thanks.
Not sure yet. I don't think I can.
Ok. I'll keep him out of the Black Sea.
If you open to the channel, I'll probably open to Holland instead of Ruhr since that would make it much harder to stab each other later. Does that sound okay?
I know, it's weird.
Yeah I'd prefer you move Warsaw to Ukraine. I'm getting conflicting messages from Austria and Turkey about what they are going to do so I don't want to antagonize either of them if I don't have to
What do you plan on doing with your fleet?
They haven't told me.
Good luck.
I don't think they're gonna go for the channel though

Yeah. It's usually just a bounce between E/F.
It usually isn't used to attack Germany unless France is already in the channel.

I'm opening Mos-stp. I can't let France know I told you this, so it's a good thing you told me. Hopefully this doesn't affect our relations.

I've heard from both Turkey and Austria that they want to go after each other. That's probably true, but Turkey seems the more aggressive of the two. I'll try and build trust with Austria and see what I can do.
So what are your plans for the Balkans?
You too!
Moving it to Picardy, I just don't want to alarm Germany. We've had a talk about bouncing in Burgundy, but I'm waiting to hear back
That's fine with me
Do you think they're more likely to move to the channel, picardy or MAO?
Okay, we should be all set to attack England then
Yes. England has just asked me what my fleet will do, and I told them I was waiting to hear back from you about bouncing in Burgundy. Trying to make them think I'm on their side
Austria will find me ready if they act. Turkey remains neutral for now. Russia is not a priority. I will push into Tyrolia if needed.
I'm hoping to take Serbia.

Hey France,
I hope you are excited for the possibility of working with you! I'd love to share information with you :)

Hey England,
I'm excited for the possibility of working with you! I'd love to share information with you :)
Me too, best of luck!
Yeah I don't think I'm going to move to Tyrolia this turn but I'm still keeping it as a DMZ
Sounds good, England doesn't seem to have much clue what they're doing
Ok cool
Just heard from Italy, they still seem pretty intent on moving against you. They said they'd be moving to tyrolia in the fall but I'm not going to let that happen.
Yeah, I'm taking Norway with a fleet though, so I would appreciate it if you didn't go for the army

Yeah Italy doesn't seem to have much of a plan yet. I asked them to move to tyrolia in the fall and they said they would but I don't really expect them to. It doesn't seem like they'll be a very useful ally in the early game.
Thanks, same to you.
We'll make the Black Sea a DMZ.
France told me Picardy, but I don't think he's lying to me, but we'll see. I think Russia is gonna open north but he hasn't said anything else.
Hey Turkey! Likewise. Have you heard anything about Italy? They're being quite aggressive in their messages to me
Yeah I think France will probably open to picardy too.
Me neither. Very suspicious
Weird, I haven't heard anything from Italy.
Ok, thanks for the intel.
Awesome.
Fair enough.
Yeah, that's the plan.
It looks like Austria and Italy are going to war. Perfect opportunity to take down Austria quickly.
Indeed
This will be very good for us :)
Then Tyrolia remains unclaimed for now. I will take it if you do not. No need for a DMZ—I will decide when it is mine.

It might also be a good idea for you and Russia to work together against Austria and Italy. Austria has shared with me that Italy and Germany are planning to attack me, so I think it would be beneficial for both of you to work against them
That said, I'd watch out for Germany and England. I believe they are working together.
Sounds like they'll be moving to Ruhr, so I'll still have to move my army to Burgundy to be safe
Turkey told me that Germany and Italy are planning to attack me. Italy has also been very aggressive in messaging me, so I wouldn't trust them
But if I were you, I would make sure you got 2 builds this year.
If you keep pushing, I'll just have to move into Piedmont and Tuscany
Yeah that's probably a smart move
Yes, I'm quite suspicious of that pair now
No worries
Tuscany is already taken. If you move into Piedmont, I will push back. I do not make empty threats.
Then I will move into Piedmont and you will fail. You will be stuck in Tuscany
Piedmont is not yours to take. If you move there, I will push back. I do not make empty threats.
It's really up to you. Germany's opening is almost always the same (with the exception of moving Munich to Ruhr and Ber to Kiel)
Lol
You have to be joking
Have you heard anything from Italy? They're being very aggressive, and not making any friends
Interesting. Thanks for the intel.
Well, I guess we'll have to wait and see what Germany does
No problem!
Then Tyrolia remains yours for now. I will not contest it. But know that I will take it if you fail to act.
Tuscany is mine. If you laugh again, I’ll make sure your next move into Piedmont ends in failure. Try me.
We will
Then move into Piedmont. I’ll meet you there with my army. You’ll regret testing me.
Tuscany is mine. Move into Piedmont, and I’ll crush your army there. I don’t make empty threats.
Hey Italy, best of luck. If you ever wanna work together just let me know.
I have no need for alliances now. My focus is Italy and beyond. If you interfere, I will not hesitate.
Yeah, he said that his only focus is Italy, but we'll see
Hey, England! How's your diplomacy going?
What are your plans for the Balkans?
Well. How about you?
Good so far. We'll see how things go after this turn.
Bulgaria and Greece are first on my agenda. How about you?
Have you talked to Italy at all?
Cool
If you need any help don't hesitate to ask
He doesn't seem very friendly.
That it will.
Ok, thanks.

So how do you want to split up Austria?
And what do we want to do about the Black Sea?
How are things going in the West?
I don't know
I am a big fan of a DMZ. What do you think?
You don't think you can take it?
Keep me updated if you learn anything, and I'll do the same.
I don't know. I don't know who I can trust.
Yes, I think that would be best.
I think I'm gonna take Belgium. I would really like to be allies and keep the channel open.
Do you think Russia will bounce you in Sweden?
The move to tyrolia was just to protect Munich. I'm glad to see you kept your word and moved to piedmont

Hmm, England moving to the channel is a bit of a disappointment.

What are your thoughts on the fall moves? Are you going to move to Belgium? Do you think Italy will try for Marseilles?

They asked me about it before the first moves but I didn't think they'd actually follow through. I was hoping to get Holland and denmark, I'll probably give Russia Sweden since they haven't provoked me yet.
England says they're moving to Belgium, so I'm going to try for London.
I intend to move to Tyrolia next turn. Let France grow strong on your behalf.
Italy is coming for you hard.
And Marseilles, I'm guessing. Trying to play it safe
You and Austria need to start working together. Russia and Germany are working together and that's not good for any of us.
You and Italy need to start working together. Russia and Germany are working together and that's not good for any of us.
Not if we stick together.
That was a good turn.
I have no interest in alliances unless they serve Italy’s goals. Focus on your own flank—Venice is not a gift.
Ok, I'm just thinking long-term. If we get rid of France, it is possible that you and Russia would work together against me. However, if you bounce Russia I would be happy to help you against Russia.
Yeah sounds good. Will you build a fleet in Brest?
It sure was! What are you thinking for this turn?

I could help you against Russia if you want. It seems like France is going to be in big trouble with Italy and you coming after them so I'd rather ally with you against Russia than with Russia against you.
I've been talking to France, they think you're going to try to convoy to Belgium. So I guess it would probably be better if you convoyed to Norway and let France take Belgium.
Looks like I was right not to trust Italy.
Alright, so I'll take Sweden and France will get Belgium?
Ok, thank you for being so helpful. I will do that.
Tyrolia is mine now. Let your warnings grow cold—France will face Italy’s will, not yours.
I can support myself into Rum, so I'll just do that and go from there.
Austria and Italy have no need for your advice. My flank is secure. If you wish to avoid conflict, keep your forces out of the Adriatic.
I'm glad to be of help. Have you talked to Italy or Austria at all? I'm trying to figure out what they are doing with their army in tyrolia and they're not really giving me much info.
Yeah, I think that makes the most sense
What are you thinking for this turn?
Yeah we'll each get 2 builds. Are you going to go for Norway with one of your units? I think it's a good opportunity to weaken England but I won't be offended if you don't try to.
Yeah, I will try.
Just so you know, I'm still planning to take Portugal with my fleet in Spain
Ok, are you going to try to move to Marseilles?

It would probably be a good idea if you tell England you'll support North Sea to Belgium, so he doesn't move there and I get Norway.
What do you think?
That sounds great! I'll be working to keep him out of Greece.
I sent Italy a message and they told me that they weren't friends with anyone but if I needed any help I would ask.
Are you working with Russia or Turkey to take care of that army in Galicia?
Who said I was in the Adriatic?

Perfect.
It looks like Italy has other things to worry about.
I'll see what England says and get back to you
Will you be moving to Tunis or Greece? Or maybe you'll go for Marseilles?
So I don't really know what they're doing.
I move where Italy chooses. My path is northward, not westward. Let France and your warnings collide.
He told me he has Austria's and Germany's support into Venice.
Hmm, that's pretty cryptic. Italy told me they were moving to Tyrolia to try to attack Austria but they probably just wanted me to leave Munich open
You did not say it aloud, but your fleet’s posture says enough. The Adriatic is Italy’s domain now.
I'll be interested to see how things go in the east

It looks like Germany wants Belgium more then he wants to attack France. He told me that he wants to support your fleet in the North Sea to Belgium.
Maybe that's a sign that France won't get his support? I don't know.
Perfect.
Russia asked me to tell you I'm supporting them to Belgium so that you wouldn't move there. I told them I would see what you had to say about it but if you don't want me to say anything, don't worry.
Have you spoken to England?
England told me they're convoying to Norway. So you're guaranteed to get Norway
I'm sorry to hear that. I hope we can work together in the future
It's good that Austria won't get Greece, because that would leave him really weak.
Thanks for the info, I'll keep that in mind
Yes, I've been talking to them too
Are you trying to say that you can talk your way out of losing Venice? I'm confused.
I see. So are you supporting North Sea to Belgium?
Also, what's your relationship like with Italy? It seems like you and Austria are friendly.
Tunis is a distraction. My armies are in Tuscany and Venice. You will meet me at the border.
I'm not moving there, don't worry.
Yeah me too. I'm so far away from you guys that it is hard to know what's happening.
Work with Italy when it suits you, not when you issue warnings. My path is northward—France is mine to handle.
Yeah I'm going to support North Sea to Belgium
Germany just told me that he will support North Sea to Belgium.
I don't think Italy knows what they're doing
Did you know that England was coming at you like that?
France taking the channel was certainly a surprise.
Great. I think Russia is going to try to bounce you in Norway but you can still take it if you convoy to there.
Yeah, that was a bit of a surprise to me
I have no idea what Italy is thinking. He basically gave away his entire plan in the first message.
I'm not sure. What do you think?
Your threats don't really intimidate me. If you want to fight me, then that's your choice. I just think you're making a mistake.
Good to know.
Agreed.
I'm not gonna take it.
Venice is Italy’s now. Your confusion ends where my fleet begins. Do not test me in the Adriatic.
What's your plan for your army in Bul?

I asked them about moving to tyrolia and they said that they would do it if I didn't let them and threatened me to get out of it. I've told them that I'm not going to let them and they've been mostly silent.
Weird. I haven't heard much from them either.
I haven't heard anything from Turkey and Russia and I haven't talked much this game so I really don't know what is going on there. It does look like Russia is going to get Rumania.
Lol
Fair enough. You're gonna focus on taking back the channel?
I think you are overreacting a little bit.
Did you tell them that I was supporting you to Norway?
So Italy is really mad at me. He says I'm not allowed to be in the Adriatic because it's "Italy's."
Because it might have been better to lie to them about that.
You think I am overreacting? My fleet is in NAP, my armies in VEN and TUS. Count again how many of those are yours.
You said 'Good to know.' Good to know that I am here. Good to know that your next move will be your last.
Also what did you and Italy plan to do with the unit in piedmont?
No. I told him that you were supporting North Sea to Belgium.
Have you spoken much to Russia or Austria? It seems like you might have trouble with Russia getting Rumania
Ok cool, thanks for the info
My army in Tuscany moves to Piedmont next turn. Your forces there will not hold. Prepare your defenses.
I have Bulgaria supporting Ukraine into Rum.
You should try to get Austria to support you into Ven.
Lol
Ok, well I don't want to fight you. I just want Greece. I'll keep my fleet in the Aegean.
Hmm, maybe next year
Have you been talking to Turkey or Austria much? It looks like they might be setting up to fight you.
Lol, I'm not going to let you in Piedmont
It does look that way, but I have no idea what to make of it.
That's what I'm worried about. Turkey asked me to keep Russia out of Rumania, and I told him I would, but I don't know if that means he will let me take Greece.
So I think Germany and Italy are together. Just a heads up.
Awesome. I'll use Gal to support Ukraine into Rum.
I heard that Austria is worried that Turkey might try to stop you from taking Rumania. It seems like Turkey is telling both of you that they'll work together against the other.

Italy is threatening to take Piedmont and push into Marseilles. I'm considering moving Spain to Marseilles, and moving Gascony to Spain. If they do actually move to Marseilles, I'll build an army in Paris to counter the attack
What's Bul doing?
That sounds good.
Yes, I don't want to be stuck between them.
Not sure yet. I'm worried about Russia and Italy.
Germany said that he's not interested in coming your way yet. I think you should start working with England against Germany.
Ok. Have you talked to Italy?
I will move into Tyrolia. Our agreement remains firm—Italy holds the west, you take the east.
Yeah
You're joking, right?
So have you been in touch with Germany much?
You think 'lol'? I think A TUS - PIE. You will find my army in your way. Try to stop me.
I am not joking. TYR is Italy's next. Our pact holds—I move west, you move east.
I'm sure you will
Moving to Greece.
You could just move to Tuscany and be done with it
You will not fight me. You will watch me take Tyrolia and Venice while you guard your Aegean dreams.
If you attack me, I will make sure that Turkey and Russia get most of my Scs.
You could just move to Tuscany and be done with it — I will meet you in Piedmont next turn.
Yeah, a little bit. Why?
Are you going to answer my question?
Okay. I'm using Gal to support Ukraine into Rum.
I take your 'I'm sure you will' as a forecast. You'll be forecasting my army in your supply centers soon.
You threaten to give your supply centers to Turkey and Russia — I will take Tyrolia before you have the chance.
ok :)
I assume that Gal is going into Vie or Bud?
Answer my action—TYR is Italy's next.
I'm worried about Germany and Italy, but I'll keep trying to see if I can trust England
Yeah.
I just wanted to know if you have been worried about him at all.
That sounds good to me.
